title: Provide coaching
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Provide coaching demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Establish coaching relationship

pcs.text: Identify areas for development according to organisational and individual requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify areas for development according to organisational and individual requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify areas for development according to organisational and individual requirements.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Apply effective communication styles to develop trust, confidence and rapport?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Apply effective communication styles to develop trust, confidence and rapport.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Make coaching arrangements on how the relationship will be conducted.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Provide a supportive environment to allow individuals to work towards achieving required skill levels.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Provide assistance and guidance in a manner that allows individuals to retain responsibility for personal performance.
